user_prompt: The cover letter you drafted is too generic. Add a sentence about their open-source contributions.
actual_output:
Understood. To make the cover letter more targeted and impactful, I will integrate a specific reference to their open-source work. 

Please provide the name of the company or the specific open-source project you would like to highlight. 

**Example Integration:**
> "I’ve been closely following your engineering team's work, particularly your recent open-source contributions to [Project Name]. Building on my own experience with community-driven development, I am eager to bring my expertise in [Skill] to help scale these initiatives further."

Once you provide the company name or project details, I will update the draft and ensure it aligns perfectly with their engineering culture.
judge_reasoning: The chatbot directly addressed the user's request to improve the cover letter by providing a template and asking for the necessary details to complete the task.
